text: Punchlists are provided as a method of identifying and recording deficiencies that are critical to our construction schedule. Excessive punch list items will indicate poor quality of work and will be brought to the attention of the Sr. Director of Construction. Our use of punch lists does not excuse the foreman or supervisor of any trade from his responsibility to walk his trades work every day to identify deficiencies and to correct them and maintain accordance to plans and specifications and to monitor the quality of the work being done.
